Title: Bolsters the use of hydrogen in relation to the state energy plan
Summary: Bolsters the use of hydrogen in relation to the state energy plan; directs various agencies to develop and implement plans for the use of hydrogen power.
LawCode: Amd §6-104, Energy L; add §1886, amd §§1884 & 1005, Pub Auth L; add §201-b, Exec L; amd §56-0603, En Con L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the energy law, the public authorities law, the executive law and the environmental conservation law, in relation to bolstering the use of hydrogen in relation to the state energy plan
